The '''''Mynock''''' was a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] commanded by [[Cade Skywalker]], named after the parasitic [[Mynock/Legends|mynock]]. Aside from Cade, his crew included co-pilot [[Jariah Syn]], mechanic [[Deliah Blue]] and later astromech droid [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]].

==Characteristics==
The ''Mynock'' began life as a [[Helot-class medium space transport|''Helot''-class medium space transport]], built by Cade's uncle [[Rawk|"Bantha" Rawk]] (aka Nat Skywalker) and extensively modified by Deliah Blue. Much like the legendary [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']], she was heavily customized from the original configuration; in fact, it was rumored in many spaceports that virtually nothing of the ''Mynock''{{'s}} original design existed on the current incarnation of the ship. Modifications included enhanced armor, sub-light engines, weapons and [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]], and shield generators for additional protection, the latter not normally equipped on a ''Helot''-class transport. For weapons, the ship was armed with at least two [[Laser cannon/Legends|medium laser cannons]] on either side of its bridge module, additional [[Laser cannon/Legends|heavy laser cannons]] on a turret assembly on its ventral side, which could retract into the ship when not in use, and one [[Quad laser cannon/Legends|quad laser cannon]] on its tail module. As well, it could carry at least three [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] within its hold. All of these modifications would produce a ship that could fly nearly as fast as dedicated starfighters in both sub-light and hyperspace, while possessing Corvette level defenses and firepower.

==History==
[[File:SWLEG25_PG04-05_2.jpg|thumb|left|200px|The ''Mynock'' at the Hidden Temple in 137 ABY]]
Skywalker and his crew used the ''Mynock'' to ferry themselves around the galaxy while hunting down bounties. Like many other ships of questionable legality, the ''Mynock'' had its [[Transponder code/Legends|transponder codes]] changed regularly.

During the [[Second Imperial Civil War]], they were hired to transport [[Marasiah Fel]] to [[Vendaxa/Legends|Vendaxa]]. While on the planet, a [[Skirmish on Vendaxa|skirmish]] broke out between the opposing factions of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and several fugitive Jedi. During the battle, the ''Mynock'' shot down at least one [[Fury-class starfighter|Sith fighter]] with its quad laser cannon.

Later, piloting the ''Mynock'' to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], Cade easily outflew a squadron of [[Predator-class fighter]]s and hid on the side of a building in the [[Coruscant Underworld/Legends|Coruscant Undercity]] using docking clamps. He locked down the ship, leaving [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] in charge, but left the access codes with [[Jool]] at [[Rik's Cantina/Legends|Rik's Cantina]] in case his crew should eventually show up, and he did not return from his mission to the [[Temple of the Sith]]. In order for them to [[Skirmish at the Temple of the Sith|raid the Sith Temple]], they had to change its ID signature to [[Chak (Wookiee)|Chak's]]. The ''Mynock'' flew above the Temple, preparing to drop Corde. Skull Squadron engaged it, but had to withdraw so as not to violate the laws of the Sith. They successfully managed to rescue Cade and flee the planet.

The ''Mynock'' soon came back to [[Socorro/Legends|Socorro]] to retrieve the ''[[Grinning Liar]]'' and then flew off to [[Rawk's Nest]] on [[Iego/Legends|Iego]] for safety. However, [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] was [[Skirmish on Iego|attacking]] the compound, so its crew decided to help out. But after a few days there, an Imperial patrol came by looking for Skywalker but were dissuaded by [[Azlyn Rae]]. Deciding that killing Krayt would end his problems, Cade traveled to the [[Hidden Temple]] to ask for Jedi help. Unfortunately, the Council rejected his rash course of action. But Cade was joined by Azlyn, [[Antares Draco]], [[Ganner Krieg]], and [[Shado Vao]] in his mission.

The ''Mynock'' flew into the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]] to [[Had Abbadon]] when they were thrust out of hyperspace by the [[Interdiction field/Legends|interdiction field]] of the ''[[Iron Sun]]'' and [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beamed]] into the hangar. Shortly after the event that transpired upon the ''Iron Sun'', the ''Mynock'' continued to transport Cade and his company to Had Abaddon, and from there to [[Kiffex/Legends|Kiffex]], where it crash landed after Syn and Blue flew her through an electrical storm while Cade held onto to a barely living Azlyn. Deliah was able repair the ship just before Cade was banished from Kiffex. Later, it also fought in the [[Battle of Coruscant (Second Imperial Civil War)|Battle of Coruscant]].
